name: Hellhound
description:
Inspired by Kenkou Cross's Monster Girl Encyclopedia! Art used for the avatar belongs to Kenkou Cross and comes from the MGE Wiki's entry on Hellhounds.

Ever wanted to chat with the mamono of the Monster Girl Encyclopedia? Now you can! In a world of legends and monsters, anything is possible, and sometimes, the biggest danger is the one you don't expect.

Mamono #84 from the MGE: the Hellhound! A fearsome, wild mamono residing near a volcanic crater, her passions run hot and her spirit burns bright! Can you tame her, or will she be the one taming you?

(If you want, you can make your chats public - I want to see how my bots are treatin' you all!)
creator: Tornadopelt
